name: WF6: Dashboard API (Webhook)
_notes: Replace YOUR_AIRTABLE_BASE_ID in all Airtable nodes before activating.
Set responseMode to 'responseNode' in both Webhook Trigger nodes.
CORS header Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * is set for local dev. Restrict to your domain in production.
The 7 parallel Airtable fetches after Compute Date Window run concurrently — connect all to a Merge node if needed.
